availabilityZone.description: The availability zone the capacity reservation is available in.

endTime.description: The time at which the capacity reservation expires. Once expired, the reserved capacity is released and Karpenter will no longer be able to launch instances into that reservation.

id.description: The id for the capacity reservation.

instanceMatchCriteria.description: Indicates the type of instance launches the capacity reservation accepts.

instanceType.description: The instance type for the capacity reservation.

interruptible.description: Indicates whether this capacity reservation is interruptible

ownerID.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the capacity reservation.

state.description: The state of the capacity reservation. A capacity reservation is considered to be expiring if it is within the EC2 reclaimation window. Only capacity-block reservations may be in this state.
